eligibility: Passed 10+2 with Physics and Mathematics and one of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Computer Science / Computer Application / Technical Vocational Subject
Board must be recognized by Central/State Government
admission_procedure: Apply for national/state level entrance exams
Seat allotment based on rank, preferences, category, and availability
Report to allotted institute within given time
selection_process: Choice filling of colleges and branches
Seat allotment based on merit and preferences

eligibility: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology in relevant discipline
selection_process: Based on GATE or PGET score
Participation in CCMT or university counselling

eligibility: BCA or Bachelor’s in Computer Science Engineering
OR B.Sc./B.Com./B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 or graduation level
Passed Higher Secondary (10+2) in General/Vocational stream from recognized board
Passed 10+2 in any stream from recognized board
Must have JEXPO rank for counselling
direct_admission: Minimum 90 marks in Mathematics and Physical Science combined in 10th for direct admission
